meta-description: Learn about nondiscrimination by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Nondiscrimination
excerpt: A requirement that job-based coverage not discriminate based on health status. Coverage under job-based plans cannot be denied or restricted. You also can't be charged more because of your health status. Job-based plans can restrict coverage based on other factors such as part-time employment that aren't related to health status.
